content.json:
# L3 Triage Dashboard
Incident funnel, top entities, ATT&CK coverage, and detection performance across the last 24 hours.

*Author: Sandeep Mothukuri — part of [sentinel-detection-engine](https://github.com/sandeepmothukuri/sentinel-detection-engine)*

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Incidents = dcount(IncidentNumber) by Severity
| order by Severity asc
content.title: Incidents by severity

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Alerts = count() by AlertName
| top 10 by Alerts desc
content.title: Top 10 firing detections

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand t = todynamic(Tactics)
| summarize Alerts = count() by Tactic = tostring(t)
| order by Alerts desc
content.title: Alerts per MITRE ATT&CK tactic

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend Entities = parse_json(Entities)
| mv-expand e = Entities
| extend Type = tostring(e.Type), Value = coalesce(tostring(e.Name), tostring(e.Address), tostring(e.HostName))
| where isnotempty(Value)
| summarize Hits = count() by Type, Value
| top 20 by Hits desc
content.title: Top entities (accounts, hosts, IPs)

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend MTTA_min = datetime_diff('minute', FirstActivityTime, CreatedTime)
| extend MTTR_min = datetime_diff('minute', ClosedTime, CreatedTime)
| summarize MTTA = avg(MTTA_min), MTTR = avg(MTTR_min) by Severity
content.title: MTTA / MTTR by severity (minutes)
